{{Infobox character
| name = Archmage Vallenar
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Archmage Vallenar]] is tasked with prioritizing the safety of survivors.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Archmage Vallenar]] is a bearded human man and an advisor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Archmage Vallenar]] is a title or identity used by [[Benri]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38">''The Pilot'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Archmage Vallenar]] is an [[Aethril]] summoner.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A misty form flowed into a bearded human man standing next to Shyrax, straightening his mantle. He dipped his hooded head to me. “Archmage Vallenar.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Right on time, Archmage Vallenar,” she said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Aethril summoner caught his attention once again and beckoned him toward the third position, standing just inside the ritual circle. “This way, Archmage Vallenar.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
